name: mad-agent-skills
description: Vendor-agnostic reusable agent skills for teams and agent runtimes.

categories.description: Real browser verification, logged-in UI workflows, visual QA, and safe external-action handling.
Release review, regression hunting, CI triage, security and correctness passes.
Implementation workflows, migrations, code generation, and release mechanics.
Product direction, GTM strategy, interface systems, brand voice creation, and customer-facing workflow design.

skills.name: devils-advocate-review
skills.summary: Engineering-only adversarial release review that verifies findings before patching.

skills.name: public-surface-redaction-review
skills.summary: Public-readiness review for secrets, private assumptions, metadata, screenshots, and generated artifacts.

skills.name: agent-worktree-coordinator
skills.summary: Coordination workflow for branches, worktrees, generated outputs, and handoffs.

skills.name: decision-ready-orchestrator
skills.summary: Turns multi-agent work, reviews, and research into evidence-backed owner decisions.

skills.name: live-browser-proof
skills.summary: Rendered UI and logged-in browser verification with safe external-action boundaries.

skills.name: interface-system-design
skills.summary: Practical product interface design for SaaS, dashboards, admin tools, real states, existing app patterns, and browser-proven UI.

skills.name: saas-product-direction
skills.summary: Product thesis, prioritization, roadmap, and product brief workflow for SaaS products.

skills.name: saas-gtm-strategy
skills.summary: ICP, positioning, offer, channel, funnel, and 90-day GTM plan workflow for SaaS products.

skills.name: create-brand-voice
skills.summary: Creates a local product-specific brand voice skill from user answers, URLs, examples, and tone rules.

skills.name: public-facing-writing
skills.summary: Keeps READMEs, docs, website copy, product copy, and brand voice work reader-facing instead of exposing internal reasoning.
